products.subheading: Four live products across collaboration, audio intelligence, family tools, and creative direction.
products.zilly.subtitle: Digital Parent
products.zilly.description: Reward points system and weekly allowance settlement for families with school-age children. Built to track positive and negative behaviors, balance goals, and keep a clear history of changes.
products.synergia.description: Platform for music collaboration from first idea to final release. Structured workflow, file exchange, feedback loops, and copyright split snapshots.
products.audity.description: AI-assisted pre-release decision layer for tracks. Upload audio and get a clear SIGN / DEVELOP / PASS verdict with structured analysis.
products.artist.description: Composer and creative systems profile combining cinematic scoring, game audio workflows, and founder-level product direction.
products.gigly.description: local discovery platform for finding events, places and real-time experiences nearby.
